import torch.nn.functional as F

# Reproduce the test
grid = torch.arange\(1 * 3 * 5 * 6, dtype=torch.float32\).reshape\(1, 3, 5, 6\) / 100.0

coords = torch.tensor\(
    [[[0.2, -0.5, 0.25],
      [0.4, -0.6, -0.5],
      [-0.2, 0.8, 0.1],
      [1.0, -1.0, -0.2]]],
    dtype=torch.float32,
\)
xy = coords[:,:,:2].unsqueeze\(2\)
z = coords[:,:,2:]

    [[ 0.0760,  0.3760,  0.6760],
     [ 0.0670,  0.3670,  0.6670],
     [ 0.2590,  0.5590,  0.8590],
     [ 0.0125,  0.0875,  0.1625]]
\)

for ac in [True, False]:
    values = F.grid_sample\(grid, xy, mode='bilinear', align_corners=ac\)
    values = values.squeeze\(-1\).transpose\(1,2\)
    print\(f'align_corners={ac}: {values[0]}'\)
print\('Expected:', expected_features\)
